description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional lounge with a modern, minimalist design, upholstered in a dark, likely synthetic or leather material. The lounge features three main seating sections forming a right angle, with a chaise extension on one end for reclining. The backrests are straight, uniform in height, and segmented into three main panels, providing structured support. Armrests are present at both ends of the L-shape, matching the height of the backrests and maintaining a boxy, geometric profile. The lounge is elevated on slender, straight metal legs, giving it a light, airy appearance and making cleaning underneath easy. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or tufting, emphasizing a sleek, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional lounge with smooth, dark upholstery, straight backrests, and slender metal legs. The design is modern and minimalist, with a chaise extension and boxy armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three main seat sections, chaise extension, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise section and the boxy armrest at the end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight, segmented backrests and the full length of the lounge.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the shorter segment of the L-shape and the armrest at the end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all attached and aligned; one extended chaise cushion; cushions are rectangular and uniform in size except for the chaise.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, uniform-height backrests segmented into three panels, with a flat top and no visible tufting or curvature.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests present at both ends, straight, boxy, and matching the height of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: Slender, straight metal legs, evenly spaced, with a simple cylindrical profile and moderate height.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth upholstery with no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
